<?php namespace Aws\S3\S3Transfer\Progress; final class TransferListenerNotifier extends AbstractTransferListener { /** @var AbstractTransferListener[] */ private array $listeners; /** * @param array $listeners */ public function __construct(array $listeners = []) { foreach ($listeners as $listener) { if (!$listener instanceof AbstractTransferListener) { throw new \InvalidArgumentException( "Listener must implement " . AbstractTransferListener::class . "." ); } } $this->listeners = $listeners; } /** * @param AbstractTransferListener $listener * * @return void */ public function addListener(AbstractTransferListener $listener): void { $this->listeners[] = $listener; } /** * @inheritDoc * * @return void */ public function transferInitiated(array $context): void { foreach ($this->listeners as $listener) { $listener->transferInitiated($context); } } /** * @inheritDoc */ public function bytesTransferred(array $context): bool { foreach ($this->listeners as $listener) { $listener->bytesTransferred($context); } return true; } /** * @inheritDoc * * @return void */ public function transferComplete(array $context): void { foreach ($this->listeners as $listener) { $listener->transferComplete($context); } } /** * @inheritDoc * * @return void */ public function transferFail(array $context): void { foreach ($this->listeners as $listener) { $listener->transferFail($context); } } }
